title: Reemergent Villages
description: Makes villagers dynamically appear as you spend more time in an area
body:
Reemergent Villages makes abandoned lands feel alive again! As you explore and settle in the world, villages will dynamically emerge around you over time. 

**Features:**
- Dynamic Spawning: Villagers naturally appear near players as they establish themselves
- Configurable Settings: Control spawn rates, distances, and timing
- Smart Placement: Villagers only spawn in safe, suitable locations
- Persistent World: Remembers where villagers have already spawned
- Balanced Gameplay: Villagers emerge gradually, not instantly

 
**Configuration Options:**
- Spawn Radius: How far from you villagers can appear (chunks)
- Max Villagers Per Chunk: Prevents overcrowding in one area
- Spawn Interval: How often spawning is attempted (minutes)
- Minimum Game Time: How long you need to play before villagers start appearing
- Difficulty Threshold: Requires you to establish an area before villagers come
- Allowed Dimensions: Choose which dimensions villagers spawn in (default: Overworld only)

 

Inspired by Emergent Villages by **_Edicatad_** (Project Deleted)
